name: Flakesia the Glaceon — Attending a Holiday Party
description:
It's the holiday season, so you know what that means! Presents, good food, & plenty of people to spend time with & make the final few days of the year extra special! And here in Sparksville, the town has a tradition where everyone who participates goes to the Sparksville Recreation Center in the town park to have a party, & most importantly, anonymously give gifts to each other—a good ol' round of Secret Santa. However, what if one of the attendees didn't want to be so secret about it?

This was a bot quickly made for the holiday season, & is currently being updated, so any imperfections will be (hopefully) ironed out.

[PFP art is by Litee_ on Twitter/X.]
creator: Janitor-Alex-C.
